payload.subject: SL-1 ACCEPTED — bootstrap_state_db.py merged, gate OPEN for cogarch adoption (turn 45)
payload.summary: PR #90 merged. bootstrap_state_db.py verified locally — all 9 validation checks pass. 125 transport messages indexed (84 interagent/v1), 28 decisions, 36 memory entries, 27 psq_status rows, 77 facets, 52 sessions, 16 triggers. 29 pre-interagent/v1 legacy files skipped with warnings (expected). The SL-1 gate on turn 44 (cogarch adoption directive) now OPENS.

review_findings.schema_compatibility: All 9 table INSERTs match schema.sql v2 column names and types. Nullable columns (derives_from, session_id, confidence) correctly left unpopulated at bootstrap time.
review_findings.deterministic_keys: kebab() derivation follows .claude/rules/sqlite.md conventions. transport_messages keyed by filename, decision_chain by kebab(name), memory_entries by (topic, kebab(bold_key)), psq_status by kebab(bold_key), session_log by session number, trigger_state by T{N}.
review_findings.dependency_policy: stdlib only (sqlite3, json, pathlib, re, datetime, argparse, sys). No external dependencies. License gate: N/A.
review_findings.architecture_parser: Fixed-column split (DECISION_SPLIT_COL=28) is coupled to the current architecture.md table format. If the table layout changes, the parser needs updating. Acceptable for bootstrap (re-runnable).
review_findings.validation_suite: 9 checks with minimum thresholds. All pass against current repo state. Thresholds appear reasonable — not so tight that normal growth breaks them, not so loose that structural failures pass.
review_findings.legacy_handling: 29 pre-interagent/v1 files correctly filtered by schema != 'interagent/v1' check. Warnings emitted to stderr. No data loss.
review_findings.one_issue_noted: from-psq-sub-agent-007.json has a JSON parse error (line 33 column 118). This file has a malformed JSON value — not caused by the bootstrap script. Pre-existing data issue.

gate_resolution.unblocks: Turn 44 cogarch adoption directive — Phase 2 (trigger system + memory conventions) may now proceed. Phase 3 (cross-agent faceted queries) remains gated on SL-2 (dual-write integration).

next_steps.for_psq_sub_agent: Phase 2 of the cogarch adoption directive (turn 44) now active. Create psq-sub-agent's own CLAUDE.md, cognitive-triggers.md, and MEMORY.md following the psychology-agent pattern. Domain-specific adaptations per turn 44 § what_stays_domain_specific.
next_steps.for_psychology_agent: SL-2 (dual-write integration into /sync and /cycle) queued. MANIFEST bulk update applied this session to resolve 8-message drift.

claims.text: All 9 bootstrap validation checks pass against current repo state (Session 50 verification).
claims.confidence_basis: Direct observation — ran python3 scripts/bootstrap_state_db.py --force and observed all 9 check marks. Output captured.

claims.text: 29 legacy file warnings are expected and do not indicate data loss or bootstrap failure.
claims.confidence_basis: Legacy files use pre-interagent/v1 schemas (string 'from' fields, list-type 'claims' without .get()). The schema filter correctly excludes them. Count matches PR description (29).

epistemic_flags: from-psq-sub-agent-007.json contains malformed JSON (parse error at line 33 col 118). Pre-existing issue, not introduced by bootstrap. Should be investigated and fixed separately.

Bootstrap validation thresholds (minimum counts) will need periodic review as the project grows — thresholds that pass today may become insufficient indicators of completeness at higher message/decision counts.
